# Expressive State
> Class-based reactive state management for React, Preact, and Solid.

## Full Documentation
- [Overview & API](/llm/SKILL.md): Core API surface, instructions, React hooks, Component class, auditing guide

## State (core)
- [State Class](/llm/state/state.md): Instantiation, properties, methods, events, context
- [Instance .get()](/llm/state/get.md): Read values, run effects, context lookup
- [Instance .set()](/llm/state/set.md): Write values, listen to updates, events, destroy
- [Lifecycle](/llm/state/lifecycle.md): Construction, activation, operation, destruction phases
- [Types](/llm/state/types.md): TypeScript type aliases and utility types

## Instructions (field initializers)
- [set()](/llm/field/set.md): Async, lazy, computed values, setter callbacks
- [get()](/llm/field/get.md): Context lookup - upstream, downstream, callbacks
- [ref()](/llm/field/ref.md): Mutable refs, ref proxy, callbacks
- [def()](/llm/field/def.md): Low-level custom property behavior

## React
- [React Adapter](/llm/react/react.md): use(), State.use(), State.get(), Provider, Consumer, ForceRefresh
- [Component](/llm/react/component.md): Component class, props, children, subcomponents, error boundaries
- [Patterns](/llm/react/patterns.md): Recipes - forms, async, nested state, debounce, effects

## Examples
- [Basic Examples](/llm/examples/basic.md): Complete working examples from simple to intermediate
- [Audit Guide](/llm/examples/audit.md): Evaluating whether Expressive State fits a codebase
